# jamfprotect_custom_prevent_list (List Resource)

Lists custom prevent lists in Jamf Protect.

## Example Usage

```terraform
list "jamfprotect_custom_prevent_list" "example" {
  provider = jamfprotect
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `name_prefix` (String) Optional name prefix filter applied to listed custom prevent lists.
